docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOTEL ABRI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM GERNEY--GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF NOV.-14-2014 REMAINS THE SAME. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID H.S. COMMINS, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED (D525). THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER MAILED TO DANNY MAYS ON OCTOBER 15, 2014. PER USPS, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYS, DANNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOTEL ABRI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Jan. 8, 2015 in Department 525:
Danny Mays Respondent/Plaintiff appears in Propria Persona.
Hotel Abri, Appellant/Defendant appears by General Manager Jim Gerney.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties are sworn. Danny Mays testifies on his behalf and responds to questions from Judge Commins. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Broken gold chain shown to the Court by Mr. Mays.

Jim Gerney testifies on behalf of Hotel Abri. The following documentary evidence are introduced: Exhibit not marked - letters from Hotel employees and hotel check in report.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence of Hotel Abri retained by the Court

Judge Pro Tempore: David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Judgment Entered
